description: Style Note These T-shirts from adidas add an extra dose of style and trend to your off duty wardrobe. Well styled with frayed edges, you can pair this T-shirt with distressed jeans and sneakers for a completely chilled-out distressed look. Product Details Olive green and black two tone T-shirt, has a V neckline with a patch that gives it a frayed look, short sleeves with contrasting white stitching at the cuffs, double layered cuffs with frayed edges, print in front and double layered hemline with frayed edges Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
